constraints: Pack lifecycle is draft. No implemented translations or runtime artifacts exist yet.
Pack lifecycle is draft. No implemented locale configuration exists yet.
Pack lifecycle is draft but mandated minimum is published. Mandate cannot be enforced until pack reaches published state.
No HIPAA compliance logic implemented. Compliance frameworks are identified only.
Pack lifecycle is draft but mandated minimum is published. Mandate cannot be enforced until pack reaches published state.
No coding tables, mappings, or transaction implementations exist. ICD-10-CM, CPT, HCPCS, and X12 5010 are identified only.
Depends on regulatory-hipaa which is also draft.

deferredItems.migrationPath: Requires: (1) lang-es pack to reach published lifecycle (currently draft), (2) Spanish translations implemented in distro and platform. Spanish is a bounded product language per VE-DISTRO-ADR-0003.

language.scopeBounds: English baseline active. Spanish pack (lang-es) exists as draft — no implemented translations.
constrainingFactors: Spanish pack (lang-es) exists as draft but has not reached published lifecycle. No translations implemented.
English pack (lang-en) is draft — no runtime artifacts.

regulatory.scopeBounds: HIPAA federal requirements identified. No compliance logic implemented. State-level privacy laws not addressed.
constrainingFactors: Regulatory pack is draft. Mandated minimum is published.
No HIPAA compliance validation logic exists.
State-level privacy laws (CCPA, SHIELD Act, etc.) not addressed.

payer.scopeBounds: No US payer packs defined yet. Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial payer integrations are future concerns.
constrainingFactors: No payer packs exist for US market.
No clearinghouse EDI adapter is implemented.

nationalStandards.scopeBounds: ICD-10-CM, CPT, HCPCS, and X12 5010 identified. No coding tables or transaction implementations.
constrainingFactors: Standards pack is draft. Mandated minimum is published.

locale.scopeBounds: en-US locale only. Date (MM/DD/YYYY), currency (USD), and number formatting identified.
constrainingFactors: Locale pack is draft — no runtime locale configuration.

clinicalContent.scopeBounds: No US-specific clinical content identified yet. VistA clinical data model is US-origin.
constrainingFactors: No clinical content packs exist for US market.
VistA's US-origin clinical model provides natural alignment but no US-specific content packs.

infrastructure.scopeBounds: No US-specific infrastructure beyond clearinghouse EDI connectivity.

operational.scopeBounds: No operational runbooks or training for US market.
constrainingFactors: No US market operational documentation exists.

gatingBlockers.blocker: Regulatory pack (regulatory-hipaa) is draft with no HIPAA compliance logic. Must reach at least implemented readiness and published lifecycle.
Standards pack (standards-us) is draft with no coding tables or transaction implementations. Must reach at least implemented readiness and published lifecycle.
No US payer packs exist. Medicare/Medicaid/commercial integrations require payer pack manifests and clearinghouse EDI adapter.
No US-specific infrastructure provisioning exists. Clearinghouse EDI connectivity and HIPAA-specific infrastructure are future concerns.
No operational documentation, training materials, or support processes exist for US market tenants.
